attributes.title: [PostgreSQL OTel] Query Performance
attributes.description: Query execution times, top queries from pg_stat_statements, temp file usage, and sequential scan rates.

"id": "", "title": "", "description": "", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": false, "markdown": "## [PostgreSQL OTel] Query Performance

This dashboard monitors query performance:
- Temp file creation and I/O (queries spilling to disk)
- Buffer cache hit ratio
- Top queries by execution time and call volume
- Sequential scans (when available)
"}, "uiState": {}, "data": {"aggs": [], "searchSource": {"query": {"query": "", "language": "kuery"}, "filter": []}}}}}, {"panelIndex": "8bbe81e2-13c3-e279-1c5a-a9577850a1b0", "gridData": {"x": 16, "y": 2, "w": 10, "h": 4, "i": "8bbe81e2-13c3-e279-1c5a-a9577850a1b0"}, "type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"enhancements": {"dynamicActions": {"events": []}}, "hidePanelTitles": true, "attributes": {"title": "Temp Files Created", "visualizationType": "lnsMetric", "type": "lens", "references": [], "state": {"visualization": {"layerId": "73e94787-1769-763c-f935-ade79670e913", "layerType": "data", "metricAccessor": "a9d6feb0-0567-6bfe-2200-d50fe0259221", "showBar": false, "applyColorTo": "background"}, "query": {"esql": "TS metrics-postgresqlreceiver.otel-*

| EVAL hit_ratio = CASE(read + hit > 0, hit / (hit + read), 0.0)
"}, "filters": [], "datasourceStates": {"textBased": {"layers": {"d194bb0f-3f2d-b53f-4994-a20326dd3396": {"query": {"esql": "FROM metrics-postgresqlreceiver.otel-*
